title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 260 至 620 行，共 925 行) ---

 263 |             summary = self._parse_structured_summary(
 264 |                 summary_text, to_summarize, 0.5
 265 |             )
 266 | 
 267 |             # 🔥 Phase 2: 缓存结果
 268 |             if len(self.summary_cache) >= self.cache_max_size:
 269 |                 # 如果缓存满了，删除最早的条目
 270 |                 first_key = next(iter(self.summary_cache))
 271 |                 del self.summary_cache[first_key]
 272 |                 print(f"   🗑️  缓存已满，删除最早条目")
 273 | 
 274 |             self.summary_cache[messages_hash] = summary
 275 |             print(f"   💾 摘要已缓存，当前缓存大小: {len(self.summary_cache)}/{self.cache_max_size}")
 276 | 
 277 |             return CompressionResult(
 278 |                 success=True,
 279 |                 strategy=CompressionStrategy.LLM_SUMMARY,
 280 |                 compressed_messages=keep_messages,
 281 |                 summary=summary,
 282 |                 compression_ratio=len(keep_messages) / len(messages) if messages else 0,
 283 |                 original_count=len(messages),
 284 |                 compressed_count=len(keep_messages),
 285 |                 metadata={"summary_text": summary_text, "from_cache": False}
 286 |             )
 287 |

 290 |             return CompressionResult(

 299 |     # ========== 策略 2: 关键帧提取 ==========
 300 | 
 301 |     def _compress_with_keyframe(
 302 |         self,
 303 |         messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
 304 |         target_ratio: float,
 305 |         min_keep: int
 306 |     ) -> CompressionResult:
 307 |         """
 308 |         提取关键帧（工具调用、错误消息、用户消息）
 309 | 
 310 |         策略：
 311 |         1. 提取所有用户消息
 312 |         2. 提取所有错误消息
 313 |         3. 提取工具调用及其结果
 314 |         4. 如果还有空间，按重要性补充
 315 | 
 316 |         Args:
 317 |             messages: 消息列表
 318 |             target_ratio: 目标压缩比
 319 |             min_keep: 最少保留的消息数量
 320 | 
 321 |         Returns:
 322 |             CompressionResult
 323 |         """
 324 |         target_count = max(min_keep, int(len(messages) * target_ratio))
 325 |         keyframes = []
 326 |         keyframe_indices = set()
 327 | 
 328 |         # 1. 提取用户消息（不超过目标数量的 40%）
 329 |         user_target = int(target_count * 0.4)
 330 |         user_count = 0
 331 |         for i, msg in enumerate(messages):
 332 |             if msg.get("role") == "user" and user_count < user_target:
 333 |                 keyframes.append(msg)
 334 |                 keyframe_indices.add(i)
 335 |                 user_count += 1
 336 | 
 337 |         # 2. 提取错误消息（不超过目标数量的 20%）
 338 |         error_target = int(target_count * 0.2)
 339 |         error_count = 0
 340 |         for i, msg in enumerate(messages):
 341 |             if i in keyframe_indices:
 342 |                 continue
 343 |             content = str(msg.get("content", ""))
 344 |             if any(keyword in content for keyword in ["Error", "错误", "Exception", "失败", "Traceback"]) and error_count < error_target:
 345 |                 keyframes.append(msg)
 346 |                 keyframe_indices.add(i)
 347 |                 error_count += 1
 348 | 
 349 |         # 3. 提取工具调用（不超过目标数量的 30%）
 350 |         tool_target = int(target_count * 0.3)
 351 |         tool_count = 0
 352 |         for i, msg in enumerate(messages):
 353 |             if i in keyframe_indices or tool_count >= tool_target:
 354 |                 continue
 355 |             if msg.get("role") == "assistant" and msg.get(...
